scripts.check: npm run check:backend && npm run check:frontend
scripts.check:backend: cd backend && npm run lint && npm test -- --passWithNoTests
scripts.check:frontend: cd frontend/suggestion && npm run lint && npm run build && npm test -- --passWithNoTests
scripts.check:coverage: npm run check:backend:coverage && npm run check:frontend:coverage
scripts.check:backend:coverage: cd backend && npm run lint && npm test -- --ci --coverage
scripts.check:frontend:coverage: cd frontend/suggestion && npm run lint && npm run build && npm test -- --ci --coverage
